violent_crime_and_border_enforcement.name: Violent Crime, Gangs, and Border Support

criminal_justice_services.name: Criminal Justice Services and Information Technology

2026.methodology: The 2026 figures reflect the official FBI budget request for 'Salaries and Expenses' submitted to the U.S. House of Representatives. Income is projected based on the requested $10.1B base authority. Spending breakdown is adjusted according to the administration's stated priorities of streamlining non-law enforcement missions and focusing on core national security and border-related support. Forecast excludes additional multi-year construction funds not part of the primary S&E request.

2025.methodology: Figures derived from the FY 2025 President's Budget Request and subsequent Enacted Appropriations. Income reflects Total New Budget Authority. Spending represents estimated gross outlays and obligations for the fiscal period based on quarterly execution reports.

criminal_justice_services.name: Criminal Justice Services and Law Enforcement

support_infrastructure.name: Criminal Justice Information Services and Construction

2024.methodology: Data extracted from the 'Audit of the Federal Bureau of Investigation Annual Financial Statements Fiscal Year 2024'. Income is defined as Total Resources (budgetary authority plus earned revenue). Spending is defined as Total Gross Costs. Percentages are calculated based on the functional breakdown of net costs and obligations provided in the Management's Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) section.
